Petition To Invalidate June 8, 2018 Restatement Of The Maurice D. Arancibia Revocable Trust And For Other Declaratory Relief
Off Calendar Oct-29-2019 Continued To Nov-26-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To (1) Determine Validity Of Restatement Of Trust And (2) Accept Resignation Of Trustee
Off Calendar Jul-09-2019 Continued To Oct-29-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Simon for Roger Arancibia (Petitioner/Respondent).
Jaime Herren for Ann Sunga (Respondent/Petitioner).

The Court noted that mediation did not work and asks the parties how they intend to proceed. Ms. Herren stated that she is nearly completed with written discovery, that responses are due on July 15th and that she is coordinating deposition dates in August. Mr. Simon stated that he will have to amend his petition, that they have had no trustee for almost a year, that he will ask the Court to appoint a temporary trustee, that he will have to amend the petition to add a 259 claim based on the alleged elder abuse and requested a 90-day continuance. The Petition to Determine Validity of Restatement of Trust, etc. and the Petition to Invalidate June 2, 2018 Restatement, etc. are continued to October 29, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Mr. Simon that if there is a need for a temporary trustee, he may want to consider coming in ex parte.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition To Invalidate June 8, 2018 Restatement Of The Maurice D. Arancibia Revocable Trust And For Other Declaratory Relief
Off Calendar Jul-09-2019 Continued To Oct-29-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To (1) Determine Validity Of Restatement Of Trust And (2) Accept Resignation Of Trustee
Off Calendar Apr-16-2019 Continued To Jul-09-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Simon for Roger Arancibia and Jaime Arancibia.
Michael Low for Ann Sunga.

The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than June 28, 2019. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by July 3, 2019. The Petition to Determine Validity of Restatement of Trust, etc. and the Petition to Invalidate June 8, 2018 Restatement of The Maurice D. Arancibia Revocable Trust, etc. is continued to and the Parties are to return on July 9, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. If the matter does not settle, the Parties are to meet and confer as to whether the Court can set the matter for hearing or how they will proceed.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
